title: A connectome of a learning and memory center in the adult Drosophila brain
abstract: We reconstructed all 983 neurons within the mushroom body alpha lobe using FIB-SEM at 8nm isotropic voxels, revealing unexpected KC-to-DAN synapses and that only 6% of KC-MBON synapses receive direct DAN input.
notes: Complete mushroom body alpha lobe connectome with unexpected synaptic motifs.
